positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for olympic_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u9,axiom,
    won_most_medals(united_states,tokyo)).

cnf(u10,negated_conjecture,
    ~won_most_medals(united_states,last_summer_olympic_games)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sporting_event(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define location_of(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
